description: INITIALIZE REPLACING NUMERIC DATA BY 99: only numeric children should get replaced.
notes: IBM gap: INITIALIZE REPLACING NUMERIC DATA BY 99 should set WS-AMOUNT to 99.00. Engine does not parse the REPLACING clause on INITIALIZE (cobol_analyzer_api does not capture it). Falls back to plain INITIALIZE: numeric=0, alpha=SPACES. WS-AMOUNT is 0.00 instead of IBM's 99.00. String vars get single space (same gap as initialize_group).
